testcase.name: test_get_auth_file_existing_path
test_retrieve_configuration_object_existing_path
testcase.failure:
self = <coguard_cli.tests.auth.common_auth_function_test.TestAuthClass testMethod=test_retrieve_configuration_object_existing_path>
def test_retrieve_configuration_object_existing_path(self): """ Tests that the return value of retrieve_configuration_object represents the contents of the file if the path does exist. """ with unittest.mock.patch( 'os.environ.get', new_callable=lambda: lambda x: None): res = coguard_cli.auth.retrieve_configuration_object( os.path.join( self.path_to_resources, "sample_config" ) ) > self.assertIsNotNone(res) E AssertionError: unexpectedly None
src/coguard_cli/tests/auth/common_auth_function_test.py:106: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_is_valid_ansible_file_actual_playbook
testcase.failure:
self = <coguard_cli.tests.discovery.config_file_finders.config_file_finder_ansible_test.TestConfigFileFinderAnsible testMethod=test_is_valid_ansible_file_actual_playbook>
def test_is_valid_ansible_file_actual_playbook(self): """ Testing an actual playbook. """ config_file_finder_ansible = ConfigFileFinderAnsible() > self.assertTrue(config_file_finder_ansible.is_valid_ansible_file( "./coguard_cli/tests/discovery/config_file_finders/resources/playbook.yaml" )) E AssertionError: False is not true
src/coguard_cli/tests/discovery/config_file_finders/config_file_finder_ansible_test.py:152: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_can_parse_tf_file_proper
testcase.failure:
self = <coguard_cli.tests.discovery.config_file_finders.config_file_finder_terraform_test.TestConfigFileFinderTerraform testMethod=test_can_parse_tf_file_proper>
def test_can_parse_tf_file_proper(self): """ Testing the function to see if we can parse a tf file. """ with unittest.mock.patch( 'builtins.open', unittest.mock.mock_open( read_data=""" resource "aws_test" bar { foo = "bar" } """)): config_file_finder_terraform = ConfigFileFinderTerraform() > self.assertTrue(config_file_finder_terraform._can_parse_tf_file( "foo.txt" )) E AssertionError: False is not true
src/coguard_cli/tests/discovery/config_file_finders/config_file_finder_terraform_test.py:145: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_terraformer_wrapper_location
testcase.failure:
self = <coguard_cli.tests.image_check.docker_dao_test.TestDockerDao testMethod=test_terraformer_wrapper_location>
def test_terraformer_wrapper_location(self): """ A bit of an unusual test, but since we are determining the location of the terraformer container relative to the docker_dao.py path, we should ensure that it stays there and that there is a test catching if it moves. """ > self.assertTrue(os.path.exists( os.path.join( ".", "coguard_cli", "docker_dao.py" ) )) E AssertionError: False is not true
src/coguard_cli/tests/image_check/docker_dao_test.py:366: AssertionError
